account.title: Account
account.usernameHelp: 3-20 characters. Letters, numbers, underscore or hyphen.
account.usernameError: Username must be 3-20 characters (letters, numbers, _ or -)
account.emailHelp: We'll send a confirmation link to the new address. The change takes effect once you click it.
account.emailPending: Confirmation sent to {email}. Click the link to finish the change.
account.noSession: Could not find an active session

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose a theme for the whole app.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: You decide what we measure. Changes take effect the next time you open the game.

team.title: Team
team.notInitialized: Your team still needs to be initialised. Save team info to create it now.
team.errorTeamName: Team name must be at least 3 characters
team.errorManagerName: Manager name must be at least 2 characters
team.errorNoSession: Could not find an active session

discord.title: Discord Integration
discord.subtitle: Receive notifications directly in Discord
discord.intro: If you link your Discord user ID, you'll be tagged in Discord when you're outbid at auctions, win auctions, receive transfer offers and more.
discord.idHelp: Find your ID: Discord → Settings → Advanced → Enable Developer Mode → Right-click your name → "Copy User ID".
discord.idHelpStrong: It's a 17-19 digit number, not your @username.
discord.idError: Discord ID must be 17-19 digits (numbers only). You probably copied the username. Right-click your own name in Discord → 'Copy User ID' (requires Developer Mode under Advanced).
discord.statusConnected: Connected. You'll receive DMs from the bot for auctions and transfers.
discord.statusDmOff: Discord ID is set, but DMs are turned off. You'll still get @mentioned in the channel.
discord.statusBotMissing: The bot isn't configured on the server yet. Only channel mentions work for now.
discord.statusIdMissing: Missing Discord ID. Add it below to receive DMs.
discord.statusUsernamePost: ) looks like a username, not a user ID. DMs won't be delivered. Replace it with a 17-19 digit number. See the guide below.
discord.toggleLabel: Receive DMs for events aimed at you
discord.toggleHint: Turn off if you don't want private messages from the bot. You'll still get @mentioned in the channel.
discord.eventOfferResolved: Your transfer offer is accepted or declined
discord.eventSeasonChange: A new season starts or ends

prefs.heading: Choose what you get DMed about
prefs.masterOffHint: Turn on DMs above to choose individual events.

auction_outbid.label: Outbid
auction_outbid.desc: Someone tops your bid, including auto-bids.

auction_won.label: Auction won
auction_won.desc: You win a rider you were bidding on.

watchlist_rider_auction.label: Watchlisted rider up for auction
watchlist_rider_auction.desc: A rider on your watchlist gets listed.

transfer_offer.label: Transfer offer received
transfer_offer.desc: Another manager bids on one of your riders.

board_update.label: Board update
board_update.desc: Your board reacts to results or finances.
